reviews.review_description: I am very happy with this game, its update, its not a stupid modded game. It has long arms and it’s great. I just wish that more people played.

As soon as I loaded in I new this was a great game. There long arms and infinite fun that no other game could beat. I had such a fun time playing. I was glitch walking, tut getting and everything u can think of. 5/5 game I recommend u should get it.

I love the moderators because my friend gave him a middle finger but he didn’t ban him he gave him a second chance and also you get the best long arms and me and my friend asked him to add our favorite map attic and he said maybe he’ll try also you get a lot of shiny rocks and everything only costs 1 also you get 1 shiny rock every 10-15 second W game imma play it all day this deserves fame
